refined_caption: The hospital kitchen appears to be preparing food in an unhygienic environment. Visible contaminants are present in the food preparation area.
complaint_description: I was appalled to see the state of the hospital kitchen where my food was being prepared. The area was dirty and there were visible signs of contamination, which is unacceptable for a healthcare facility. I'm worried about the risk of infection from the food.
voice_text: The hospital food is being prepared in a really dirty kitchen, I can see contaminants everywhere. This is disgusting and I'm scared to eat the food.
